actNotes.notes:
Clearfell       - Beira         - 10% Cold Res
Hunting Ground  - Crowbell Boss - 2 Passive Points
Freythorn - King In The Mists - 30 Spirit + Lvl4 Spirit Gem
Ogham Farmlands - Una's Lute    - 2 Passive Points
Ogham Manor     - Candlemass    - +20 Life

Ctrl+Alt+S to open settings and drag/scale windows

Check Vendor at level up for
Movespeed boots - Max 10% this Act
New Weapon
Potions: Lvl 4, 10, 16, 23
Act and Zone Notes are this wide----------------------------

Traitor's Passage    - Balbala      - Ascendancy
Keth                 - Kabala       - 2 Passive Points
Valley Of The Titans - Ancient Vows - Choice
Deshar               - Final Letter - 2 Passive Points
Spires Of Deshar - Sisters Of Garukhan - 10% Light res

Check Vendor at level up for
Movespeed boots - Max 15% this Act
New Weapon
Potions: Lvl 23, 30, 40

Sandswept Marsh - Orok Campfire     - Lesser Jeweller's
Jungle Ruins    - Mighty Silverfist - 2 Passive Points
Venom Crypts    - Venom Draught     - Choice
Azak Bog        - Ignagduk - 30 Spirit / Lvl10 spirit gem
Jiquani's Machinarium - Blackjaw    - +10% Fire res
Aggorat         - Blood Sacrifice   - 2 Passive Points

Check Vendor at level up for
Movespeed boots - Max 20% this Act
New Weapon
Potions: Lvl 30, 40, 50

Journey's End           - +2 Passives
Halls of the Dead       - +5 for each Res or Stat 
Halls of the Dead       - 5% Increased Max Mana
Trials of the Ancestors - +2 Passives
Abandoned Prison        - Life/Mana Flask Recovery
Arastas - Evening Bell  - 3 Exalted Orbs

Eye of Hinekora when you free Matiki
Kedge Bay > Whakapanu > Prison > Arastas > Ngakanu
Shrike Island/Isle of Kin (maybe optional)

Check Vendor at level up for
Movespeed boots - Max 25% this Act
Potions: Lvl 40, 50, 60

No zone notes for Interludes :( change the zone to 
see the bonuses each Interlude gives to choose your
own order to do the Interludes

Completing all Interludes gives +2 Passives

Check Vendor at level up for
Movespeed boots - Max 25% in Interludes
Potions cap out at required level 60

zoneNotes.notes:
Kill Hillock and Exit > Town

Thank you for using Path Of Levelling 2!

[Optional] Mud Burrow boss has Lvl 2 Skill + Lvl 1 Support

Minimap shows a grey-ish path to Mud Burrow if you don't
have transparent terrain

If entering up/left and you immediately see a bridge, Beira
and exit is on your side, Mud Burrow is other side
Otherwise entering up/left means only one bridge, and all 
points of interest are on the other side of the bridge

If entering up/right, anything could be anywhere, good luck

Exit > The Grelwood

Skippable area, Devourer drops Lvl 2 Skill + quest reward
Lvl 1 Support

Boss is directly left/right/up/down from the entrance

Four locations, always shaped like a diamond

If you find The Grim Tangle or The Red Vale, go in and grab 
the waypoint before coming back

1) The Grim Tangle - enter and get the waypoint
2) Tree Of Souls + Waypoint
3) Brambleghast - Lvl 1 Skill
4) Areagne's Hut - optional potions + Lvl 1 Skill

Exit > The Red Vale, usually same corner as Brambleghast

Usually a spiral pattern, try following the zone clockwise
or counterclockwise with the wall just offscreen

Listen for music when altar is nearby

One altar may randomly spawn in the middle of the zone

Kill the boss, TP > Town, then Waypoint > The Grim Tangle

Go roughly up and left

Zone layout may be flipped vertically, so if you start north
go south

[Optional] Rotten Druid drops a Lvl 1 Support

Exit > Cemetary Of The Eternals

Zone layout may be rotated
Wall-follow around the zone, get both checkpoints first
Exits usually on opposite sides of the zone

Grave on the edge of the zone could have an Iron Ring

Checkpoint > Mausoleum Of The Praetor

Second time here Checkpoint > Tomb Of The Consort

Draw a line from the exit through the tile in the middle of
the zone, boss is usually in that direction

If you enter at the bottom of the zone, boss could be on the
right of the center

Kill the boss, Exit > Cemetary Of The Eternals
Then Checkpoint > Tomb Of The Consort

Boss is usually in north corner of the zone or in the middle

Follow the corridors through the center of the zone

TP > Town, Waypoint > Cemetary Of The Eternals for boss

Follow the edge of the zone clockwise

Kill Crowbell for 2 Passive Points. If you find a giant pit
the boss is nearby

If you find Ogham Farmlands or Freythorn then go in, get the
waypoint and come back

Exit > Freythorn, or TP Town then Waypoint if you got it

Second time here Exit/TP > Ogham Farmlands

This layout is busted, good luck.

If you find the final ritual without the other 3, there are
wisps that point to the direction of the remaining rituals

Kill King In The Mist then TP > Town
Then Waypoint > Hunting Grounds to Exit > Ogham Farmlands

Usually go down and left, exit always on opposite wall from
entrance

Last layout image is the Una's Lute tile. Quest item is
always on the other side of the broken down caravans

Exit > Ogham Village

Follow the edge of the zone north

If you find the boss before Renly's Tools take Checkpoint to
the entrance then wall-follow south

Kill The Executioner then Exit > The Manor Ramparts

Layout could be flipped vertically! Usually go clockwise

[Optional] Gallows on north wall has Lvl 1 Support, or south
wall if layout is flipped

Each floor has a bridge roughly in the middle, find that
first

First Floor usually up and right

Second and Third floors go in the opposite direction as 
previous floor

Exit > Act 2!

Zone layout may be flipped, Boss is either down/left or 
down/right, rougly Z shape

Stay on the tip of Rathbreaker's cliff to avoid spears

Kill Rathbreaker then TP to start and Exit > Town
In Town Caravan > The Halani Gates, don't need to talk to 
Sekhema just get the ! over her head then Exit > Town

In Town Caravan > Mawdun Quarry

Roughly Z Shape. If in doubt follow a wall

Exit > Mawdun Mine

Boss is usually directly north from entrance

RECOMMEND Fire Res, boss can deal a lot of damage. Watch out
for mines

Exit > Traitor's Passage

If you find Decree of Imprisonment lore item, follow pages
on the wall for Balbala, then the other direction for exit

Six Sisters indicate you're going the right way. Could get
really early Six Sisters, there's a layout image for that

Exit > The Halani Gates

Head to opposite corner from entrance

RECOMMEND Lightning Resistance, Topaz Charm

In Town Caravan > Keth

Wall-follow clockwise.
If you find exit before boss, Checkpoint > entrance and
    wall-follow counter-clockwise
If you find exit before boss AGAIN, Checkpoint > entrance
    and try the other two points in zone layout image
There is a head-shaped tile near boss, looks like a round 
buried building

XP is great here

Exit > The Lost City

Zone is shaped like a diamond with bridges as the corners

First bridge is either far left or far right of the first
"rectangle"

[Optional] There is a sarcophagus with Lvl 6/7 Skill

Exit > Buried Shrines

Zone is two rectangles joined by bridges

The direction the bridge points tells you where the boss is:
South - North: boss is directly up
North - South: boss is directly left

Boss tile has V-shaped bridge facing north-east

[Optional] Elemental Offering event drops a magic 
cold/fire/lightning res ring

Kill the boss, TP > Town then Caravan > Mastodon Badlands

Wall-follow the wall opposite the Waypoint

Abyss in this area drops Jawbone (weapon mod)
Effigy in this zone drops Lvl 1 Support

Exit > Lightless Passage

Second time here Exit > The Bone Pits

Well of Souls is always top-left

Exit > Well of Souls
Then Waypoint > Mastodon Badlands

Bone Arch near entrance to zone points directly to the boss

Kill boss then TP > Town and Caravan > Valley Of The Titans

Wall-follow either direction for seals and permanent buff,
third seal might be in the middle of the zone

Exit > The Titan Grotto

Zone is shaped like a rectangle, follow the direction the 
bridge from the entrance takes to get to the opposite side
Boss is on long straight bridge similar to entrance

Usually stay in 12 o'clock for first phase and 3 o'clock for
second phase

Kill boss then TP > Town, use Horn on North tip of Caravan 
Then Caravan > Deshar

Quest item is on the outside of one of the buildings

Exit is on the furthest edge of second area with buildings

Exit > Path Of Mourning

Area is unpredictable, try going to opposite corner of zone
from entrance

Can also try 3-3-3 method of going right for three bridges,
up/right for three bridges, down/right for three bridges,
repeat

Don't forget the Sisters Of Garukhan!!!
Sisters should be in a G-shaped tile, use process of 
elimination to find it

Kill Tor Gul, TP > Town then Caravan > The Dreadnought

Be patient, enemies jump behind you, easy to get swarmed

Go roughtly up/left

Be patient, enemies jump behind you, easy to get swarmed

RECOMMEND lightning resist

Go roughtly up/left

In swamp area kill Rootredge for Lvl 9 Skill Gem, usually in
the middle

In grass area Azak Campfire is on north or south of exit,
drops Lesser Jeweller's Orb

Exit > Town then Exit > Jungle Ruins

Three main locations:
1) Infested Barrens - opposite wall from entrance
2) The Venom Crypts - in one of 9 places arranged in a grid
3) Silverfist - usually top third of zone, occasionally in
    the middle

If you find The Venom Crypts go in, get waypoint, come back

Steps:
1. Start following the downward wall to find 2) or 3)
2. From opposite side checkpoint to the start and wall 
    follow the other way to find 1)
3. If you found all 3 locations then Exit > Infested Barrens
4. Else scan back and forth through the zone starting from
    top/left third of map

[Optional] Jungle grave for a belt
[Optional] Troubled Camp for a vendor

Exit > Infested Barrens

All locations are on edges of zone so wall-follow to get all
checkpoints and The Matlan Waterways Waypoint

Exit > The Azak Bog

Second time here Exit > Chimeral Wetlands

Third time here Exit > The Matlan Waterways

Boss is generally in up-right quarter of the zone

Kill boss, TP > Town then Waypoint > Infested Barrens then
Checkpoint > Chimeral Wetlands

If you spawn on the edge of the zone, corpse is always in
the middle, follow the wall opposite the entrance

If the corpse is not in the middle it can be in any corner,
good luck

Wall-follow to the right

Jiquani's Machinarium always faces the left (right wall)
Temple of Chaos always faces down (top wall)

Get waypoint for ToC and Jiquani's Machinarium then 
Exit > Jiquani's Machinarium

Listen to loot filer sounds if you have one, quest item will
make a sound before you can see it

Blackjaw is in far left or far right of zone

Exit > Jiquani's Sanctum

For second generator, respawn at checkpoint then walk away a
bit, rinse and repeat until soul core spawns nearby

Checkpoint to start of zone for boss

Kill boss then TP > Town then Waypoint > Infested Barrens to
Exit > The Matlan Waterways

RECOMMEND fire resist and patience

Find the lever then TP > Town then Exit > The Drowned City

Don't forget the waypoint at the start!

Go up/right until you hit a wall, then down/right until you
find a large area with a checkpoint. This is an ambush
Exit the ambush then turn down/right then up/right for exit

If you see Molten Vault, enter to get the Waypoint, but you
don't need 3-to-1 until endgame so leave this zone for later

Exit > Apex Of Filth

Best to leave this zone for after Campaign for fastest clear

Go up/left until you pull lever to cross the lava
Go up/right, cross bridges and enter doors when stuck
Eventually you'll hit a wall, go bottom/right to reach boss

Zone moves approximately up/right or up/left
Halfway point in the zone is a big arch, after that turn
left, then turn right, and continue to the end of the zone
If the boss isn't there, turn right again and keep checking
that end of the zone

My eyes :(
Kill the boss then TP > Town 
Then go down the big stairs again to Exit > Temple of Kopec

Each floor is a triangle and the exit is in a corner

Door won't show on minimap until you're really close, don't
turn away too early

Second floor has an unpassable hole, the boss room is on the
other side of it.

Utzaal has same layout as The Drowned City

Follow the path with the big tiles, boss is in the same 
place that you were ambushed in The Drowned City

Go up/right until you hit a wall, then down/right until you
find boss room
After boss turn down/right then up/right for exit

Exit > Aggorat

Find the gigantic area with altar with the enemies praying, 
go through the arch to get to second half of zone

In the second half of zone do the sacrificial heart for 
2 Passive Points

Exit to the Black Chambers is diagonal from the altar area
Exit > The Black Chambers

Go left or right until you cross first bridge

Continue in the same direction after the bridge to find 
checkpoint with second bridge

Follow the bridges that float out of the water

Kill Doriyani!

Head in the opposite direction as the dock
When you hit a wall, follow it
Exit > Volcanic Warrens

Long and winding area, boss is at the very end of it
Kill the boss then TP > Town 
By now you have ToTA and weapon so sail > Arastas

Just keep following the zone to the end
Exit > Journey's End

Winding area, keep following the zone to the end
Checkpoint to start to fight Omniphobia
TP > Town then Sail > Whakapanu

Great XP here
Can kill the Great White One for the shark fin, turn
in at Ngakanu for a Skill, Spirit, OR Support gem
Exit > Singing Caverns

The Beckoning Clam gives quest item for a Perlescent
Amulet at Rog, generally worth finding
Solved layout just follow the images
Kill the boss, TP > Town and Sail > Abandoned Prison

Don't miss Navali's 5% Max Mana
Exit > Halls of the Dead

Don't miss all 3 Res/Stat tattoos
Fairly linear layout, kill the boss 
Exit > Trial of the Ancestors

Get the +2 Passives then TP > Town
Sail to the next island, follow the Act Notes

Find the Goddess of Justice then
Exit > Solitary Confinement

Follow the wall the waves are hitting
Kill the boss then TP > Town
In Town start doing optional areas for Matiki/Weapon

Incredibly linear layout just keep moving forward
Kill the boss then TP > Town
In Town start doing optional areas for Matiki/Weapon

1. Get out of town square, there is nothing here
2. Hug top wall to get to Evening Bell
3. [Optional] Morning Bell is opposite side of
  Coastal Ridge as Evening Bell
4. Follow the coastal ridge then through town to
  kill boss and Exit > The Excavation

Pick a wall and follow it all the way to the boss
Kill the boss and TP > Town to Sail > Ngakanu

After leaving the main building follow the wall to
Exit > Heart of the Tribe

Keep trying to head north, every time you see a 
Checkpoint go back and find the fork, you went the
wrong way
Kill Tavakai and you're done with Act 4!

Optional Area!
Do the expedition then continue with the act

Holten - Sould of the Ferryman - Cheap Greater Runes
Wolvenhold - +2 Passives

The Khari Crossing - Skullmaw Stairway - 5% Max Life
The Khari Crossing - Worm and Scorpion - +2 Passives
Qimah - Choice of 7 buffs (can change later)

Kriar Village - +40 Max Spirit
Howling Caves - +2 Passives
Kriar Peaks - Elder Maddox - Unique Item
